_note: BCP 2019 Sunday, Holy Day and Commemoration Lectionary. Notation rules: citation = primary (full) reading; alternate = shorter or alternate passage. Parenthetical e.g. Luke 2:1-14(15-20) → citation: Luke 2:1-20, alternate: Luke 2:1-14. OR alternatives → first is primary. 'v' suffixes (New Coverdale Psalter) stripped. Em-dashes normalised to hyphens. Simon and Jude: BCP documents give Oct 28; website shows Oct 27 — verify.
